steps: File formal tax reclaim with Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 excess withholding on BHP dividend citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate
Submit documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and eligibility for reduced withholding under Article 10 of AU-NO treaty
Reference ATO guidance on foreign resident dividend withholding and treaty benefits to support 15% rate claim
Follow up with custodian within 30 days if no acknowledgment of reclaim request

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
